exploration_notes: Created django/middleware/ratelimit.py with RateLimitMiddleware following the exact pattern used by existing Django middleware (SecurityMiddleware, XFrameOptionsMiddleware, CommonMiddleware). The middleware extends MiddlewareMixin, calls super().__init__(get_response), reads settings via getattr with defaults, and uses process_request to intercept requests before they reach the view.
